depth1Count.Wiki: Number of mutations in this category for depth 1.

depth2Count.Wiki: Number of mutations in this category for depth 2.

depth3Count.Wiki: Number of mutations in this category for depth 3.

depth4Count.Wiki: Number of mutations in this category for depth 4.

depth5Count.Wiki: Number of mutations in this category for depth 5.

categoryId.Wiki: Used with ChaosMatchingMutationEnemyTableParam, for determining which mutation category to use.
